Battleship - Class in battleship.view
View class of Battleship that contains all methods and variables to show the game.
Battleship() - Constructor for class battleship.view.Battleship
Creates a new Processing view of Battleship.
battleship.controller - package battleship.controller
Package of the controller class for BattleshipController.
battleship.model - package battleship.model
Package of the model class for BattleShip.
battleship.view - package battleship.view
Package of the view classes for Battleship.
battleshipAdvantage() - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
If the battleship of a player is opened by enemy, player has this advantage.
battleshipBlue - Variable in class battleship.model.CardsTest
 
BattleshipController - Class in battleship.controller
A controller implementation for a GUI view.
BattleshipController(IBattleshipView, String) - Constructor for class battleship.controller.BattleshipController
Creates a new controller object with the given view and team.
BattleshipGame - Class in battleship.model
The game implementation of Battleship.
BattleshipGame(String) - Constructor for class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
Creates a new Game instance with given team.
BattleshipGameTest - Class in battleship.model
unit tests for the `BattleshipGame` model.
